functions.name: Sales Engine
functions.constraint: Lead-to-booked jumped to 69% MTD (13 leads, 9 booked) after Smart Lead Router went live. Tom still 12% book rate but Anthony/Elliot now getting priority leads. 275 Harry-owned leads still queued for redistribution.
functions.key_metric: Book Rate: 69% MTD | Close Rate: 63% | CPBC: $76 (7d, critical) | Router: 38 leads redistributed
functions.highest_leverage_task: Tom accountability - daily activity tracked, speed-to-lead alerts live

functions.name: Mentor Journey
functions.constraint: 63% of churned families never assigned a mentor. Activation is the #1 retention lever. No-show recovery engine now running (78 contacts in pipeline).
functions.key_metric: 60 active families | 9 paused | 4 past due | $830 at-risk MRR
functions.highest_leverage_task: Brodie activation chase - daily automated list at 7:45am

functions.name: Member Experience
functions.constraint: MRR dropped $5.4K in 48hrs (68 to 60 active families). Churn rate 67.6% needs Stripe audit - likely inflated by test subs. Circle pilot = retention play.
functions.key_metric: 60 collecting | 9 paused | $41.6K MRR | Circle: 19 parents said YES
functions.highest_leverage_task: Circle pilot decisions by Apr 3 - date, facilitator, pricing

functions.name: Brand & Content
functions.constraint: Mentor outreach W1 sent (55 emails). W2-W5 scheduled Apr 8-11. All content still depends on Harry.
